tasks.label: Start dev environment
tasks.detail: Boot Postgres + Django (autoreload) + notifier at http://localhost:8000

tasks.label: Run tests
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm web pytest

tasks.label: Seed demo data
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm web python manage.py seed_demo
tasks.detail: Creates demo admin/provider/parent accounts, a term and sample classes

tasks.label: Create superuser
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm web python manage.py createsuperuser

tasks.label: Make migrations
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm web python manage.py makemigrations

tasks.label: Django shell
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm web python manage.py shell

tasks.label: Tail logs
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f web notifier
